meta.title: Air Force Jobs - Security Forces
meta.description:
The United States Air Force Security Forces were formerly known as Military police. The largest career section within the Air Force, their job is to protect military bases and weapons across the globe as well as law enforcement.
 Training is split into weapons, law enforcement and field training to ensure that the Security Forces experience every scenario before they are deployed.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting  training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
